page_metadata.biotools__summary: CiliaQ is a simple, open-source ImageJ plugin for automated quantification of ciliary morphology and fluorescence in 2D, 3D, and 4D images.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CiliaQ is a simple, open-source ImageJ plugin for automated quantification of ciliary morphology and fluorescence in 2D, 3D, and 4D images.
